book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
title: Session XVI.

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: (Labbe and Cossart, Concilia, Tom.

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to the Emperor!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to Constantine, our great Emperor!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to the Orthodox King!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to our Emperor that maketh peace!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to Constantine, a second Martian!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to Constantine, a new Theodosius!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to Constantine, a new Justinian!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to the keeper of the orthodox faith!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: O Lord preserve the foundation of the Churches!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: O Lord preserve the keeper of the faith!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to Agatho, Pope of Rome!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to George, Patriarch of Constantinople!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to Theophanus, Patriarch of Antioch!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to the orthodox council!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: Many years to the orthodox Senate!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Theodore of Pharan, the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Sergius, the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Cyrus, the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Honorius, the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Pyrrhus, the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Paul the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Peter the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Macarius the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Stephen the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Polychronius the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To Apergius of Perga the heretic, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To all heretics, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: To all who side with heretics, anathema!

verses.book: The Sixth Ecumenical Council. The Third Council of Constantinople.
verses.text: May the faith of the Christians increase, and long years to the orthodox and Ecumenical Council!
